title: Metabase HTTP channel webhook URL is fetched without host validation
description: channel/send! :channel/http builds a clj-http request from the admin-supplied :url and posts to it without any check on the destination host. Webhook test and webhook subscription flows reach this code path with a user-controlled URL, so a self-hosted Metabase can be coerced into making HTTP requests to internal metadata services (e.g. metadata.google.internal) and any colocated unsecured local resources. The fix introduces metabase.util.http/valid-host? with strategy-driven blocking of link-local, loopback, site-local, and known cloud-metadata hosts and inserts a guard before send!.
